BERT: Bidirectional context, fast fine-tuning, stable convergence, interpretable per-class outputs
GPT: Coherent generation, learns domain style, prompt-controllable, stable training
Text-GAN: Unconditional generation from noise; no labels needed; conceptually flexible

BERT: Cannot generate text; sensitive to class imbalance without oversampling; needs labels
GPT: Hallucinates facts; output quality scales with corpus size; can't evaluate inputs
Text-GAN: Highly unstable on small corpora; mode collapse and D-dominance common; from-scratch vocab limits quality

BERT: Text classification, NER, semantic similarity, sentiment analysis
GPT: Text generation, completion, prompt-controlled drafting, domain adaptation
Text-GAN: Unconditional adversarial sampling, augmentation for downstream tasks

GPT: Classification tasks, exact factual lookup, deterministic outputs
Text-GAN: Reliable text generation; production deployments; small corpora
